name: 旧刊米黄
description: 浅黄米白纸张与暖棕衬线字的轻复古杂志主题

fonts.body: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif
fonts.heading: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif
fonts.table: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif

avatar.container: width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.16); box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(110,84,53,0.08);
avatar.image: object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease; filter: saturate(0.96) contrast(1.02);

header.userName: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #5a4230; font-family: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif;
header.userId: font-size: 14px; color: #927559; font-family: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif;
header.postTime: font-size: 13px; color: #9a7f63; font-family: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif;

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #8f7458; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.18); background: rgba(247,241,227,0.96);
footer.text: color: inherit; white-space: nowrap; font-family: Georgia, "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", "STSong", SimSun, serif;

h1.base: margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 1.96em; letter-spacing: 0; line-height: 1.32; text-align: left;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #7f613f; background: rgba(138,95,52,0.08); padding: 0 4px;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #654b37; line-height: 1.82;

code.block: background: #fbf6ec; padding: 1.1em 1.2em; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; font-family: SF Mono, Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #5e4630; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.16);
code.inline: background: #fbf6ec; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; color: #795437; font-size: 14px; font-family: SF Mono, Menlo, monospace; border: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.12);

styles.quote: border-left: 3px solid rgba(138,95,52,0.48); padding: 2px 0 2px 18px; margin: 1.25em 0; color: #6a5039; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.82; background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(138,95,52,0.07), rgba(138,95,52,0));
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.4em auto; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.14);
styles.link: color: #8a5f34; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(138,95,52,0.35); text-underline-offset: 3px; transition: opacity 0.2s ease;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.35em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.18); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.26);
table.header: background: #f2e8d6; font-weight: 700; color: #5a4230; padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.18);

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 1px solid rgba(110,84,53,0.24); margin: 28px 0;
